nasb.text: But now I will not treat the remnant of this people as in the former days,’ declares the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: But now I will not deal with the remnant of this people as in the former days, declares the Lord of hosts.

cnv.text: 但現在我待這些餘剩的子民必不像從前的日子那樣。

ccb.text: 如今我不会像从前那样对待这些余民了。这是万军之耶和华说的。
